## Submission checklist

- [ ] `results/<MyMethod>/` contains one subdirectory per seed (`1/`, `2/`, `3/`), each with the 200 result JSONs for that seed
- [ ] New row added to `f2d_leaderboard.tex` in the section matching the sensor setup above
- [ ] BibTeX entry added to `references.bib` with a key matching the `\cite{...}` in the new row
